free_text: A new cross-section measurement of reactions induced
by 3He particles on a carbon target
Mean 3He primary-beam energy and energy degradation
were determined using the code LISE++ with the
Energy and efficiency were calibrated by 152Eu and
Shielded with 2 cm of lead and 2 mm of iron to reduce
the very intense 511 keV gamma line.

Co foil (3 um) placed on the degrader rack was also
Al foil used as energy degraders
Data were normalized by beam integrated charge,
which were checked by aluminium and cobalt
